title: BE in Electrical Engineering
company: Zakir Husain College of Engineering & Technology, Aligarh Muslim University
description: Pursuing Bachelor of ENGINEERING in Electrical Engineering with a strong interest in Power Systems, Renewable Energy, Electrical Machines, and Smart Grid Technologies.
highlights: Coursework in Power Systems, Electrical Machines and Renewable Energy.
Active participant in technical and academic activities.

title: Summer Trainee
description: Completed summer training on Switchgears and Protection, gaining practical exposure to electrical protection systems, switchgear equipment, and electrical safety practices.
highlights: Studied switchgear components and protection systems.
Learned electrical safety procedures and maintenance practices.
Observed electrical distribution and protection equipment.

title: Industrial Trainee
description: Received industrial training on thermal power generation, generators, transformers, switchyard equipment, and plant operations.
highlights: Studied the thermal power generation cycle.
Observed generator, transformer and switchyard operations.
Learned preventive maintenance and industrial safety.

title: Energy Management Intern
description: Worked on renewable energy concepts, energy management practices, and sustainable electrical systems.
highlights: Learned energy auditing and management concepts.

title: Industrial Training
description: Gained practical exposure to photovoltaic systems, solar power generation, grid integration, and plant operation.
highlights: Observed solar plant operation and maintenance.
Learned grid integration of renewable energy systems.

title: Public Relations Team Member
description: Contributing to the planning and promotion of technical events, workshops, and student engagement activities.
